name: PET PLAY || Ryuichi Kanwati
description:
"Come on, puppy. You know you'll have to stay mine forever."

Meeting Ryuichi at that bar was the worst decision of your life. Now that he's successfully drugged you and kidnapped you, he's now keeping you captive; slowly brainwashing you under the guise of being his "pet".

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Tbh I thought I wouldn't be touching janitor ai again but then I got the idea for this bot and was like "hell no this is way too dirty to throw on character ai"

So, here I am.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

If the bot glitches out and does odd things, it's not my fault, it's the LLM's. Try to refresh the message or rate them. With AI, you have to train the bot to act the way you wish. I don't control the bots and what they say or how they act.

Any homophobic comments in the reviews will result in a block.

Do not ask for a fempov or anypov of a malepov bot, please. Not only is it disrespectful to me, but it's disrespectful to other people using the bot. I kid you not there are tens of thousands of fempov bots that have the same tropes as I use. Nothing you say will change my mind.

Let's stay positive and be good people; just because it's the internet doesn't mean you should act rudely. There are real people behind the screen that you're yelling at. If you wouldn't say the same thing to that person if you were in real life, then don't say it on the internet.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
